text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap manages to secure a place in the
Arima Kinen, an impressive feat for a classic-year
runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unsurprisingly, she seems a little nervous just
before the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She remembers the spectators' passion and
excitement she witnessed last year. This time,
she's determined to be the star of the show.
